languages.text: "Укрепления поселений, возведенные во время бешенства Погонщиц, неплохо проявили себя вновь, Лорд-капитан, так что меровский полк выиграл немало жизней и времени".
"The settlement fortifications erected during the Drovers' frenzy have performed well again, Lord Captain, so the Merov Regiment has saved a significant number of lives and bought themselves time."
languages.original_text: "Укрепления поселений, возведенные во время бешенства Погонщиц, неплохо проявили себя вновь, Лорд-капитан, так что меровский полк выиграл немало жизней и времени".

traits.locale_text: "The settlement fortifications erected during the Drovers' frenzy have performed well again, Lord Captain, so the Merov Regiment has saved a significant number of lives and bought themselves time."
"The settlement fortifications erected during the Drovers' frenzy have performed well again, Lord Captain, so the Merov Regiment has saved a significant number of lives and bought themselves time."
"The settlement fortifications erected during the Drovers' frenzy have performed well again, Lord Captain, so the Merov Regiment has won a significant number of lives and bought themselves time."
"The settlement fortifications erected during the Drovers' frenzy have performed well again, Lord Captain, so the Merov Regiment has saved a significant number of lives and bought themselves time."
"The settlement fortifications erected during the Drovers' frenzy have performed well again, Lord Captain, so the Merov Regiment has saved a significant number of lives and bought themselves time."

languages.text: 「牧畜狂の時代、築かれた砦は再び機能しました。メローヴ連隊は多くの命を救い、時間稼ぎに成功しました」
languages.original_text: "The settlement fortifications erected during the Drovers' frenzy have performed well again, Lord Captain, so the Merov Regiment has won a significant number of lives and bought themselves time."

traits.locale_text: 「牧畜狂の時代、築かれた砦は再び機能しました。メローヴ連隊は多くの命を救い、時間稼ぎに成功しました」

languages.text: «Las fortificaciones construidas durante el arrebato de los Pastores han vuelto a funcionar, Lord Capitán, por lo que el regimiento de Merov ha logrado salvar numerosas vidas y ganar tiempo».
languages.original_text: "The settlement fortifications erected during the Drovers' frenzy have performed well again, Lord Captain, so the Merov Regiment has saved a significant number of lives and bought themselves time."

traits.locale_text: «Las fortificaciones construidas durante el arrebato de los Pastores han vuelto a funcionar, Lord Capitán, por lo que el regimiento de Merov ha logrado salvar numerosas vidas y ganar tiempo».

languages.text: “舰长大人，此前为应对拒生花狂潮而修筑的定居点防御工事再度立功，梅罗夫军团藉此保全了大量兵力，赢得了宝贵的时间。”
languages.original_text: "The settlement fortifications erected during the Drovers' frenzy have performed well again, Lord Captain, so the Merov Regiment has saved a significant number of lives and bought themselves time."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，此前为应对拒生花狂潮而修筑的定居点防御工事再度立功，梅罗夫军团藉此保全了大量兵力，赢得了宝贵的时间。”

languages.text: "Die gegen die rasenden Treiber errichteten Befestigungen haben erneut gehalten, Lord Captain. So konnte das Merov-Regiment zahlreiche Leben retten und sich selbst Zeit verschaffen."
languages.original_text: "The settlement fortifications erected during the Drovers' frenzy have performed well again, Lord Captain, so the Merov Regiment has saved a significant number of lives and bought themselves time."

traits.locale_text: "Die gegen die rasenden Treiber errichteten Befestigungen haben erneut gehalten, Lord Captain. So konnte das Merov-Regiment zahlreiche Leben retten und sich selbst Zeit verschaffen."

languages.text: "Çobanların saldırısı sırasında inşa edilen yerleşim tahkimatları yine iyi iş çıkardı Lord Kaptan, böylece Merov Alayı önemli sayıda canı kurtarıp kendine zaman kazandırmış oldu."
languages.original_text: "The settlement fortifications erected during the Drovers' frenzy have performed well again, Lord Captain, so the Merov Regiment has saved a significant number of lives and bought themselves time."

traits.locale_text: "Çobanların saldırısı sırasında inşa edilen yerleşim tahkimatları yine iyi iş çıkardı Lord Kaptan, böylece Merov Alayı önemli sayıda canı kurtarıp kendine zaman kazandırmış oldu."

languages.text: « Les fortifications érigées pour tenir les Chasseurs en respect ont fait leurs preuves, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Elles ont permis au régiment de sauver de nombreuses vies et de gagner du temps. »
languages.original_text: "The settlement fortifications erected during the Drovers' frenzy have performed well again, Lord Captain, so the Merov Regiment has saved a significant number of lives and bought themselves time."

traits.locale_text: « Les fortifications érigées pour tenir les Chasseurs en respect ont fait leurs preuves, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Elles ont permis au régiment de sauver de nombreuses vies et de gagner du temps. »
